AutoCalibrationRequest.description:
Request body for POST /api/calibration/optimize.

Set the two targets; the optimizer sets workforce growth directly (it is
deterministic via E077) and searches COLA/merit until the mean YoY avg-comp
growth is within tolerance of the comp target.
AutoCalibrationRequest.title: AutoCalibrationRequest

AutoCalibrationResult.description: Outcome of the search: best params + the run that produced them.
AutoCalibrationResult.title: AutoCalibrationResult

AutoCalibrationSettings.description: Search targets and knobs for one auto-calibration.
AutoCalibrationSettings.title: AutoCalibrationSettings

CalibrationParameterSet.description:
Tunable compensation levers, shared identically with the full simulation.

Only the fields the analyst overrides need to be set; unset fields fall back
to the loaded config. ``target_growth_pct`` is used solely to compute the
per-year delta -- it does not affect the build.

scenarios.description: List of scenario IDs in comparison

info.description: Backend API for PlanAlign Studio - Workforce Simulation Platform
info.title: PlanAlign API

get.description: Get the status of a batch job.

post.description:
Enqueue an auto-calibration search; poll /calibration/runs/{run_id}.

The search runs several fast comp-only builds (typically 3-6); expect a
few minutes for a multi-year range.

Enqueue a comp-only calibration run; poll /calibration/runs/{run_id}.

Request validation still fails fast (404 unknown workspace, 422 bad
range/params); build-time failures surface on the job record instead
(409 prerequisite guard, 500 unexpected).

get.description: Poll a calibration job: status, then results/outcome or error.

Get the default simulation configuration.

Returns the base configuration that new workspaces will inherit.

schema.title: Response Get Default Config Api Config Defaults Get

get.description:
Check system health.

Returns healthy status along with any issues or warnings.
Generate both representations from one exact archived run.
Return all currently active simulation runs for page-refresh recovery.
Download a specific artifact file.

Get detailed information about a scenario's last simulation run.

Includes timing, configuration, artifacts, and results summary.

Get simulation results for a completed scenario.

Will return results if either:
- The scenario status is "completed", OR
- There is a completed run in the run history

Export simulation results as Excel or CSV.

Will attempt export if results files exist, regardless of scenario status.

post.description:
Start a simulation run for a scenario.

The simulation runs in the background. Use the status endpoint or
WebSocket to monitor progress.
Cancel a running simulation.

schema.title: Response Cancel Simulation Api Scenarios  Scenario Id  Run Cancel Post

post.description: Force reset a stuck simulation status.

schema.title: Response Reset Simulation Status Api Scenarios  Scenario Id  Run Reset Post

get.description: Get the status of the current or last simulation run.

Full run telemetry snapshot (feature 094).

Canonical state for page-refresh restore and the degraded polling
fallback. Reads only in-memory state — never touches the scenario
DuckDB, so it is always safe to call during a run.
List all runs for a scenario.

schema.title: Response List Runs Api Scenarios  Scenario Id  Runs Get

get.description: Get details for a specific run.
Get paginated log lines for a simulation run.
Get sync configuration.

post.description:
Disconnect sync from remote.

Removes Git remote configuration but preserves local files.

Initialize sync with a Git remote.

Sets up Git-based synchronization for all workspaces.
Creates necessary .gitignore and configuration files.

get.description:
Get sync operation history.

Returns recent push, pull, and other sync operations.

schema.title: Response Get Sync Log Api Sync Log Get

post.description:
Pull remote changes to local workspaces.

Fetches and merges changes from the remote repository.
Conflicts are handled according to the configured strategy.

Push local changes to remote.

Stages all workspace metadata files and pushes to the configured remote.
Large files (databases, exports) are automatically excluded.

get.description:
Get current sync status.

Returns information about:
- Whether sync is initialized
- Configured remote and branch
- Number of local changes
- Ahead/behind remote status

Get sync information for all workspaces.

Returns status of each workspace including whether
it has local changes pending sync.

schema.title: Response Get Workspace Sync Info Api Sync Workspaces Get

get.description:
Get detailed system status.

Returns comprehensive information about the system state.
List all available pre-configured scenario templates
Get a specific template by ID

List all pre-defined vesting schedules (T030).

Returns all available vesting schedule types with their
percentage progressions and descriptions.

List all workspaces.

Returns summary information for each workspace including scenario count
and storage usage.

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api Workspaces Get

post.description:
Create a new workspace.

If no base_config is provided, uses the system default configuration.

Start a bulk export operation.

Returns an operation ID for tracking progress.
Use GET /bulk-export/{operation_id} to check status.

get.description:
Get status of a bulk export operation.

Returns progress information including completed exports.

Download an individual archive from a bulk export operation.

Each workspace in a bulk export generates its own archive.

post.description:
Start a bulk import operation.

Uploads multiple archives and imports them sequentially.
Default conflict resolution is 'rename' (auto-generate unique names).

get.description:
Get status of a bulk import operation.

Returns progress information including imported workspaces.

post.description:
Import a workspace from a 7z archive.

If a name conflict exists, provide conflict_resolution:
- 'rename': Use new_name or auto-generated unique name
- 'replace': Delete existing workspace and import
- 'skip': Skip this import (not applicable for single import)

Validate an archive before import.

Checks archive integrity, manifest validity, and name conflicts.
Returns validation result with any conflicts or warnings.

delete.description:
Delete a workspace.

WARNING: This deletes all scenarios and results in the workspace.

schema.title: Response Delete Workspace Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Delete

get.description:
Get a workspace by ID.

Returns the full workspace including base configuration.

put.description:
Update a workspace.

Allows updating name, description, and base configuration.
Validates seed config sections (promotion_hazard, age_bands, tenure_bands)
atomically — if any section is invalid, the entire update is rejected.

get.description:
Compare DC Plan analytics across multiple scenarios (max {MAX_SCENARIO_COMPARISON}).

Returns side-by-side analytics for comparison.

parameters.description: If true, include only active employees in participation metrics
parameters.name: active_only

schema.description: If true, include only active employees in participation metrics
schema.title: Active Only

parameters.description: If true, use effective_annual_deferral_rate for the deferral distribution.
parameters.name: effective_rate

schema.description: If true, use effective_annual_deferral_rate for the deferral distribution.
schema.title: Effective Rate

get.description: Run 401(a)(4) general nondiscrimination test for one or more scenarios.

parameters.description: Include employer match in contribution rate
parameters.name: include_match

schema.description: Include employer match in contribution rate
schema.title: Include Match

get.description: Run Section 415 annual additions limit test for one or more scenarios.
Run ACP non-discrimination test for one or more scenarios.
Run ADP non-discrimination test for one or more scenarios.

parameters.description: Mark plan as safe harbor (returns exempt)
parameters.name: safe_harbor

schema.description: Mark plan as safe harbor (returns exempt)
schema.title: Safe Harbor

get.description: Get available simulation years for NDT testing.

Compare two scenarios and classify employees as winners, losers, or
neutral based on total employer contributions (match + core).

post.description:
Analyzes census data to suggest optimal age band boundaries based on
employee age distribution. Focuses on recent hires when possible.
Uses percentile-based boundary detection.
post.summary: Analyze census for age band suggestions

post.description: Analyze the age distribution of employees in a census file to match hiring patterns

schema.title: Response Analyze Age Distribution Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Analyze Age Distribution Post

post.description: Analyze compensation min/max/median/percentiles by job level from census data. By default, focuses on employees hired in the last 4 years for more relevant new hire targeting. Use lookback_years=0 to analyze all employees.

schema.title: Response Analyze Compensation By Level Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Analyze Compensation By Level Post

post.summary: Analyze compensation ranges by job level

post.description:
Analyzes census data to suggest a target opt-out rate based on the non-participant
rate among employees hired within a configurable tenure lookback window.
post.summary: Analyze census for opt-out rate suggestion

post.description: Compute the fraction of census employees whose scheduled annual hours (scheduled_hours_per_week * 52) fall below 1,000. Returns column_present=false when the census file lacks a scheduled hours column.

Analyzes census data to suggest optimal tenure band boundaries based on
employee tenure distribution. Uses percentile-based boundary detection.
post.summary: Analyze census for tenure band suggestions

post.description:
Analyzes census data to suggest termination rates for experienced employees
and new hires based on actual termination history in the census file.
post.summary: Analyze census for turnover rate suggestions

get.description: List all batch jobs for a workspace.

schema.title: Response List Batch Jobs Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Batches Get

get.description:
Compare multiple scenarios against a baseline.

Returns pre-calculated deltas for workforce metrics and events.
Compare effective configuration and provenance for two scenarios.
Retrieve current age and tenure band definitions from dbt seed files
Retrieve current promotion hazard parameters from dbt seed files

post.description:
Export a workspace as a 7z archive.

Returns a downloadable archive containing the workspace data and manifest.
The archive filename includes the workspace name and timestamp.

Raises:
    404: Workspace not found
    409: Simulation is currently running

post.summary: Apply a saved template to this import session

get.summary: Mapped preview (first 100 rows with transforms applied)
Raw preview (first 100 rows, no mapping applied)
Auto-suggest canonical field mappings for uploaded columns
List all generated Parquet files in workspace

delete.summary: Delete a Parquet file (workspace creator only)

post.description:
Run all (or selected) scenarios in a workspace as a batch.

Returns a batch job ID that can be used to monitor progress.

get.description: List all scenarios in a workspace.

schema.title: Response List Scenarios Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Scenarios Get

post.description:
Create a new scenario in a workspace.

The scenario will inherit the workspace's base configuration,
with config_overrides applied on top.

delete.description:
Delete a scenario.

WARNING: This deletes all simulation results for this scenario.

schema.title: Response Delete Scenario Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Scenarios  Scenario Id  Delete

get.description: Get a scenario by ID.

put.description:
Update a scenario.

Allows updating name, description, and config_overrides.
Validates seed config sections (promotion_hazard, age_bands, tenure_bands)
atomically — if any section is invalid, the entire update is rejected.

get.description:
Get DC Plan contribution analytics for a single scenario.

Returns participation rates, contribution totals, deferral distributions,
and escalation metrics.

parameters.description: If true, include only active employees in participation metrics
parameters.name: active_only

schema.description: If true, include only active employees in participation metrics
schema.title: Active Only

parameters.description: If true, use effective_annual_deferral_rate for the deferral distribution (matches contribution calculation). If false, use current_deferral_rate (year-end snapshot).
parameters.name: effective_rate

schema.description: If true, use effective_annual_deferral_rate for the deferral distribution (matches contribution calculation). If false, use current_deferral_rate (year-end snapshot).
schema.title: Effective Rate

post.description:
Run vesting analysis comparing two schedules (T031).

Compares current vs proposed vesting schedules and projects
forfeiture differences for terminated employees in the
specified simulation year.

get.description:
Get available simulation years for vesting analysis.

Returns the list of simulation years present in the scenario's
database, sorted ascending, with the default (final) year.

post.description:
Apply workforce parameters from this scenario to target scenarios.

Copies workforce assumptions (compensation, turnover, hiring,
demographics, seed configs) while preserving DC plan parameters
in each target scenario.

get.description:
Get the fully merged configuration for a scenario.

This returns the workspace's base configuration with the scenario's
config_overrides applied.

schema.title: Response Get Scenario Config Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Scenarios  Scenario Id  Config Get

delete.description:
Delete only the scenario's simulation database, keeping configuration intact.

This allows re-running the simulation from scratch without losing config.

schema.title: Response Delete Scenario Database Api Workspaces  Workspace Id  Scenarios  Scenario Id  Database Delete

get.description:
Export simulation results as Excel or CSV (workspace-scoped endpoint).

E087: This endpoint eliminates ambiguity in multi-workspace environments
by requiring the workspace_id, avoiding the need to search all workspaces.

post.description: Assign an existing Parquet file as the workspace census data source

Given a target average compensation growth rate (e.g., 2% per year), solve for the COLA, merit budget, promotion increase, and promotion budget that achieve that target. IMPORTANTLY, this solver accounts for workforce dynamics (turnover and new hire compensation) which significantly impact average compensation growth.
Upload a census file (Parquet or CSV) to a workspace's data directory
Validate a file path and return metadata if valid
